title: LAir's Bosses
description: This mod adds two bosses to the game, The Spirit of the Forest and Zeus, along with a new structure: Olympus.
body:
# New bosses

This mod introduces two new bosses to Minecraft : Zeus and the Spirit of the Forest.

## Zeus  
Zeus resides in Olympus, a structure that appears in the sky. 

![The Olympus structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12dd3764daf2309273a72109e6ad8c051a89e0b2.jpeg)



Defeating him allows you to obtain a weapons that gives you the power of lightning.

![A battle against Zeus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c77523d72c781f85fb3c54ab5c8fc3ab5f1252a.jpeg)

## The Spirit of the Forest  
If you engage in too many non-ecological actions, your eco-score will drop, and this boss may appear to challenge you...  

![The Spirit of the Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aad44c26155c638b8b5fce14dd70aef14a0c6a5.jpeg)

If you manage to kill him, he will drop the forest wand which shoots projectiles.

![The forest wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9526e1a457082062174e7add086a87dd67650689.jpeg)
